name: Canvas Rectangle Laundry Hamper - Brightroom™: Beige, 80L Capacity, Open-Top, Multipurpose Clothes Sorter, No Assembly Required
description:
Upgrade your laundry setup with this Rectangle Laundry Hamper from Brightroom™. This laundry hamper showcases a cream-color silhouette and two wooden handles in light brown for easy lifting and carrying from room to room. The open-top design allows for quick and easy access when loading and unloading, while the deep rectangular shape provides ample space for holding dirty clothes, offering a clean aesthetic.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
